description: AstroImageJ is installed and a sequence of 25 FITS images is located in ~/AstroImages/quality_control/. Most images are high-quality observational data, but 3 specific frames have been artificially degraded to simulate common observing faults (cloud/transparency loss, wind shake, or focus drift). Identify the 3 degraded frames and list their full filenames, one per line, in a text file named bad_frames.txt at ~/Desktop/.
